incidents.detail: A rapid counter-attack down the left sees Depay receive possession from Frenkie de Jong. He shifts the ball onto his right foot and strikes a curling drive from 20 yards that beats Yassine Bounou at the far post.
Hakimi picks up a yellow card for a tactical foul on Xavi Simons, sliding in recklessly as the winger accelerates down the right flank.
Reijnders is cautioned for an aggressive challenge on Youssef Belammari in midfield, catching the Morocco midfielder high.

El Ouahdi exploits a gap on the left flank after a Netherlands defensive breakdown. He cuts inside and strikes a low left-footed shot from 17 yards that rolls past Bart Verbruggen into the bottom corner.
Aguerd receives a yellow for a cynical foul, pulling back Frenkie de Jong as he breaks forward into Morocco's half.
Dumfries is cautioned for a robust challenge on Noussair Mazraoui as tensions rise in the closing stages.
